Bash(curl -s -X POST https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/contacts/search -H 'Authorization: Bearer pit-d69e9efe-abfc-409d-9d70-edd0c8fece68' -H 'Version: 2021-07-28' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"locationId":"DNirEjy0ejVwbHsaBYrn","filters":[{"field":"tags","operator":"contains","value":"Active Member"}],"pageLimit":100}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/contacts/search -H 'Authorization: Bearer pit-d69e9efe-abfc-409d-9d70-edd0c8fece68' -H 'Version: 2021-07-28' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"locationId":"DNirEjy0ejVwbHsaBYrn","filters":[{"field":"tags","operator":"contains","value":"active member"}],"pageLimit":100}')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('contacts',[]\); print\('total:', d.get\('total',0\)\); print\('sample tags:', [x.get\('tags',[]\) for x in c[:3]]\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('total:',j.total\); j.contacts.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.name, '| tags:', c.tags\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const withTags=j.contacts.filter\(c=>c.tags&&c.tags.length>0\); withTags.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.firstName,c.lastName,'| tags:',c.tags\)\); console.log\('total with tags:',withTags.length,'of',j.contacts.length\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('count returned:',j.contacts.length,'| meta:',JSON.stringify\(j.meta||{}\)\); }\)")
